name: Steele Electric
tagline: Licensed C-10 electrical contractors serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County
seoDescription: Steele Electric is a licensed C-10 electrical contractor in Santa Rosa, CA (CSLB #983365), serving Sonoma County since 2013 with residential, commercial, and service electrical work — panel upgrades, rewires, generators, and more. Licensed, bonded, and insured.

sections.heading: Electrical work done to code, the first time
sections.subheading: Steele Electric is a licensed C-10 electrical contractor handling residential, commercial, and service work across Sonoma County — from panel upgrades and rewires to generators and new circuits. Licensed, bonded, and insured.

sections.eyebrow: Why homeowners and builders call Steele
sections.heading: A licensed electrician you can actually count on
sections.intro: A C-10 license, a clean safety record, and more than a decade of work across Sonoma County — the basics done right, every job.

items.title: Licensed & accountable
items.body: California C-10 electrical contractor (CSLB #983365), active since 2013 — bonded and insured, with the workers' comp coverage to back the crew on your site.

items.title: Permitted and to code
items.body: Work pulled, inspected, and signed off the right way. Dozens of permitted projects on record across the county, from service changes to commercial buildouts.

items.title: Residential & commercial
items.body: One crew for the panel upgrade at your house and the tenant improvement at your shop — service work, remodels, and new construction alike.

items.title: Local to Sonoma County
items.body: Based in Santa Rosa and working the surrounding North Bay — close enough to show up when you need an electrician, not a call center.

sections.heading: Residential, commercial, and service electrical
sections.intro: From a single dead outlet to a full commercial wiring package, Steele Electric handles the whole range of C-10 work.

items.title: Residential electrical
items.description: Panel and service upgrades, whole-home rewires, new circuits and outlets, lighting, EV charger installs, ceiling fans, and troubleshooting for older Sonoma County homes.

items.title: Commercial & service work
items.description: Tenant improvements, commercial buildouts, lighting and power for shops and offices, and ongoing service calls for businesses that need a reliable electrician on file.

items.title: Power, panels & backup
items.description: Main panel replacements, sub-panels, generator and backup-power installs, and code-correction work to bring older systems up to current standards.

sections.heading: The credentials behind the work
sections.body: Steele Electric is a fully licensed California C-10 electrical contractor — the credential the state requires for electrical work — and has held it in good standing since 2013.

sections.heading: Need an electrician in Sonoma County?
sections.body: Whether it's a panel upgrade, a remodel, or a problem you can't figure out, call Steele Electric at (707) 318-4917 or send the details and we'll get you a straight answer.

sections.heading: Electrical work for homes and businesses
sections.subheading: A licensed C-10 contractor handling the full range of residential, commercial, and service electrical work across Sonoma County.

sections.heading: Home electrical
sections.intro: Most Sonoma County homes were wired decades ago. We bring them up to current loads and code — safely.

items.title: Panel & service upgrades
items.description: Replace an old or overloaded main panel and upgrade the service to handle modern loads — EV chargers, AC, and added circuits.

items.title: Rewires & new circuits
items.description: Whole-home and partial rewires, plus dedicated circuits for appliances, workshops, and outdoor power.

items.title: Lighting & outlets
items.description: Recessed and fixture lighting, switches, outlets, GFCI protection, and ceiling fans installed clean.

items.title: EV charging & backup
items.description: Level 2 EV charger installs and generator or backup-power wiring for outage-prone areas.

sections.heading: Commercial & service work
sections.intro: A C-10 contractor for tenant improvements, buildouts, and the ongoing service calls a working business depends on.

items.title: Tenant improvements
items.description: Power, lighting, and data rough-in for retail, office, and restaurant spaces — coordinated with your build schedule.

items.title: Commercial buildouts
items.description: New-construction and remodel electrical for commercial spaces, permitted and inspected.

items.title: Lighting & power
items.description: Commercial lighting design and replacement, added circuits, and equipment power for shops and offices.

items.title: Service & repairs
items.description: Troubleshooting, code corrections, and on-call service for businesses that need a reliable electrician on file.

sections.heading: What working with us looks like
sections.intro: No surprises — a straightforward process from the first call to a finished, inspected job.

items.title: Call or send the details
items.body: Tell us what's going on — a problem, an upgrade, or a project. We'll talk through scope and what it'll take.

items.title: Estimate & permit
items.body: You get a clear estimate, and where the work requires it, we pull the proper permit so it's done by the book.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Licensed, insured, and tidy on site — the job done to code with the right materials.

items.title: Inspected & signed off
items.body: Permitted work is inspected and signed off, so you've got a paper trail and a system you can trust.

sections.heading: Have a project to scope?
sections.body: Send the location and what you need — we'll tell you what it takes to do it right.

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa electrical contractor built on doing it right
sections.subheading: Steele Electric has held an active California C-10 electrical license since 2013, working homes and businesses across Sonoma County.

sections.heading: Local, licensed, and accountable
body: Steele Electric is a Santa Rosa-based electrical contractor that's held an active California C-10 license — the state credential required to do electrical work — since 2013. Over more than a decade, that's meant dozens of permitted projects across Sonoma County, from residential service changes to commercial buildouts.

The approach is simple: be licensed and insured, pull the right permits, do the work to code, and stand behind it. For homeowners and builders in the North Bay, that's the difference between an electrician you call once and one you keep on file.
highlights: Active and in good standing since 2013
Bonded and insured, workers' comp current

items.title: C-10 licensed
items.body: California Contractors State License Board #983365 — the C-10 Electrical classification, active and in good standing since 2013.

items.title: Bonded & insured
items.body: Contractor bond on file and liability coverage in place, with current workers' compensation for the crew.

items.title: Clean safety record
items.body: A clean state safety record across more than a decade of permitted electrical work in Sonoma County.

items.title: Permitted work
items.body: Dozens of documented, permitted projects on record — work pulled, inspected, and signed off properly.
